mnemonics: DAD: Determine the Model, Assess the Fit, Decide on Transformation/Differencing
keyPoints: Determine the appropriate model form (e.g., AR, MA, ARMA) for the time series.
Assess the preliminary fit of the chosen model to the data.
Decide if and what kind of transformation or differencing is needed to achieve stationarity.
commonMistakes: Attempting to estimate parameters before correctly identifying the model structure.
Overlooking the need for differencing to handle non-stationary data (e.g., trends).
Misinterpreting the Autocorrelation Function (ACF) and Partial Autocorrelation Function (PACF) plots, leading to an incorrect model order.
